name: First Baptist Church Lexington
description: First Baptist Church Lexington is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lexington, TN. There are 2 indoor wood courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Guy B. Amis Park
description: Guy B. Amis Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Lexington, TN. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and lights. The courts are free.
